content:
# AI Video Creation in 2026: A Beginner's Guide to Getting Started

Creating professional videos used to require expensive gear and years of experience — now you can do it in hours with AI tools! Let's walk through everything you need to know.

For more video tools, check out our [[link:/category/Video|Video category]]!

---

## Step 1: Define Your Goal & Script

Start with what you want to say! Write a simple script or outline (even bullet points work).

---

## Step 2: Choose Your Tool Type

1. **Text-to-Video: [[link:/tools/51|VEED.io]] (beginner friendly!)
2. **AI Avatar: [[link:/tools/48|Synthesia]]
3. **Generative Video: [[link:/tools/29|Pika Labs]] or [[link:/tools/50|Runway ML]]

---

## Step 3: Start Creating (Text-to-Video First

For absolute beginners, start with [[link:/tools/51|VEED.io]] because it's browser-based, intuitive, and has auto-subtitles!

---

## Step 4: Add Voiceover with AI

For voiceovers, use [[link:/tools/78|Murf AI]] — simple, affordable studio-quality voices in minutes.

---

## Step 5: Edit & Export

Keep videos short at first (30-60 seconds)! Focus on clear messaging.

---

## Top Beginner Tools

1. [[link:/tools/51|VEED.io]] (easiest overall
2. [[link:/tools/48|Synthesia]] (best for talking head videos)
3. [[link:/tools/29|Pika Labs]] (best for fun, stylized videos)

---

## Final Tips

- Start simple!
- Test free tiers first
- Iterate quickly
- Learn by doing

Discover more Video tools → [[link:/category/Video|/category/Video]]

---
